name: Oblivion Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName]'s long tongue lovingly dominates [TargetName]'s mouth as she lets out a seductive laugh, and a sinful, potent magic aura envelopes the two of you briefly, the dark curse's connection giving her free access to your mana as starts to hungrily siphon your mana for herself kiss by kiss, trading you her sweet saliva in exchange while gulping down every bit of your energy.
miss: [AttackerName]'s long tongue lovingly dominates [TargetName]'s mouth as she lets out a seductive laugh, and a sinful, potent magic aura envelopes the two of you briefly, the dark curse's connection giving her free access to your mana as starts to hungrily siphon your mana for herself kiss by kiss, but you manage to break the kiss long enough to disrupt the spell.
